channel.title: Cloud on Anekoique's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud on Anekoique's Blog

item.title: Virtualization Series 08 — VM Management and Cloud Extensions
item.description: The operational layer: lifecycle, snapshotting, pre-copy / post-copy live migration, high-availability replication (Remus), microVMs (Firecracker), and fleet orchestration. How operational requirements shape VMM architecture.
